notes: Core pong mechanics work but there's a critical bug in checkPaddleCollision where 'paddle === paddle.left' always evaluates false (comparing parameter to property), causing the direction to always be -1 and breaking left paddle bounces; also ArrowUp/ArrowDown keys are stored as 'arrowup'/'arrowdown' in lowercase but checked as 'ArrowUp'/'ArrowDown'.
Excellent visual fidelity and core gameplay loop, but arrow keys are completely broken due to a toLowerCase() bug in the input handler.

Looks like Pong and should render without crashing, but a major paddle-collision bug on the right side breaks core gameplay and the control mapping text conflicts with actual left-paddle movement keys.
